title: Vana (disambiguation)
content:
'''Vana''' may refer to the following individuals:

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Vana Dorja]]''', a [[Imperial Navy/Legends|naval]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Imperial Remnant]]
*'''[[Vana Sage]]''', a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] active around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]
*'''[[Vana-Xo]]''', a [[Voss Mystics|Voss Mystic]] who lived during the [[Galactic War]]

{{Disambig}}
